hero.headline: Your World, Delivered.
hero.subheadline: From your front door to any destination on the planet. EDP Courier moves every package with speed, precision, and complete visibility every step of the way.
hero.placeholder: Enter your EDP tracking number, e.g. EDP-2026-000001

features.subtitle: From a single document to full freight charters, every shipment moves with the same level of care, precision, and real time visibility.

tracking.title: Real Time Tracking
tracking.description: Live status updates at every checkpoint of your shipment journey. Know exactly where your package is at all times.

global.title: Global Network
global.description: Our carrier network spans 180 countries with established partnerships at every major hub and port worldwide.

secure.title: Secure Handling
secure.description: End to end chain of custody documentation, tamper proof seals, and encrypted data on every shipment we carry.

express.title: Express Options
express.description: Same day, overnight, and next day delivery tiers for time sensitive shipments that cannot wait a moment longer.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready
enterprise.description: Dedicated infrastructure, custom API integrations, and volume pricing for businesses shipping at serious scale.

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.description: Automated route optimization selects the fastest, most reliable path for every package based on live carrier data.

how.title: Track Your Shipment in Three Steps.
how.subtitle: Simple, instant, and accurate. Shipment tracking the way it should be.

step1.title: Get Your Tracking Number
step1.description: The moment your shipment is booked, our system generates a unique EDP tracking number and sends it directly to you. This number is your key to complete shipment visibility from pickup through to final delivery.

step2.title: Enter It Into Our System
step2.description: Paste your EDP tracking number into the search bar on this page or the dedicated tracking page. Our platform instantly locates your shipment anywhere in the world regardless of which stage it is currently in.

step3.title: Follow Every Milestone
step3.description: Watch your package progress through every stage of its journey with live milestone updates, precise location data, courier hand off records, and a continuously refreshed estimated delivery time.

services.title: Every Shipping Need, Covered.
services.subtitle: Whether you are sending a document across a city or palletized freight across continents, EDP Courier has the right service for you.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: Priority handling at every hub. Guaranteed delivery windows with full real time tracking and courier signature confirmation on arrival.

freight.title: International Freight
freight.description: Full customs clearance support, duty calculation, and commercial documentation for cross border freight of any volume or size.

sameDay.title: Same Day Courier
sameDay.description: Local pickup and delivery within hours. For urgent documents, medical cargo, legal papers, and time critical business goods.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Logistics
enterprise.description: Dedicated fleet allocation, account management, warehouse coordination, and custom API integration for high volume enterprise shippers.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Businesses Around the World.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shipping, tracking, and working with EDP Courier.

trackPage.title: Track Your Shipment.
trackPage.subtitle: Enter your EDP tracking number below for real time status updates and complete journey history.

notFound.heading: No Shipment Found.
notFound.body: We could not find a shipment matching the tracking number {id}. Please verify your number and try again.
notFound.help: Need help? Contact our support team.
